_warning: HAND-AUTHORED override map for scripts/sync_art.py. A sync script that overwrites this file is a bug. This file exists ONLY to correct entries whose wiki page title (derived from our display name) is wrong, or whose page's FIRST image is not the one we want.
_how_it_works: For each kind, map our slug -> { page?: exact wiki page title, image?: exact File: name to pull instead of the page's lead pageimage, no_matte?: true to skip the 6E background-removal cutout when the AI matte mangles a particular image }. Anything not listed resolves by name automatically. The contact sheet (before/after columns) + the FAIL-LOUD miss list tell you what to add here.
_license: Downloaded artwork is © Eiichiro Oda / Shueisha / Toei Animation, used as attributed fan reference. It is NOT covered by the repo's MIT license. Every downloaded file carries a manifest row with its source URL.

bartholomew-kuma._reason: BOTH the anime AND manga Infobox files are the BACK of his coat (the paw emblem); this is the cleanest front-facing anime face
